configurePresets.name: user-prefs
configurePresets.description: CMake-level user preferences (build system, tool paths). Kconfig-owned options (NF_BUILD_RTM, NF_PLATFORM_NO_CLR_TRACE, NF_CLR_NO_IL_INLINE, NF_FEATURE_WATCHDOG, NF_WP_TRACE_*, NF_WP_IMPLEMENTS_CRC32) have moved — see config/user-kconfig.conf.TEMPLATE.
